title: Billocraft
description: Explore an improved version of vanilla minecraft with quality of life features, rather simple content expansion and optimization
body:
![Billocraft Banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a132357dc80a0e933705a38e1f6d1a590db8b20c.png) # Quests There are more mods in the pack but these are the features you need to actively know of.
English 🛠️[Reforge your weapons and armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/tieredz) 💍[Find many artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) 📦[Use a storage system](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) ✈️[Fly with a hang glider](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider) 🛋️Decorate using cosmetic elements: [furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture), [plushies](https://modrinth.com/mod/plushie), [sawmill](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill), [connectible chains](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectiblechains), [trims for tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/trimmable-tools), [rollercoasters](https://modrinth.com/mod/splinecart) and [more stone variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) 🎵[Play custom music](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinurl) and [dance](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) 🗝️[Discover enhanced trial chambers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lukis-crazy-chambers) and other improved vanilla structures 🔮[Upgrade your enchantments (Sharpness VI, Protection V, ...)](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion) --> (1) Kill _Invoker_ in Woodland Mansion; (2) Craft _Imbuing Table_; (3) Play raids for _Hallowed Gems_ 👹[Defeat new bosses for unique rewards](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) **🔒The following features can be temporarily locked to slow progression on a server:**
🔥[Explore the nether with new biomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium) as well as [items and structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-nether) 🏰[Get shulker boxes in new dungeons in the desert]([https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeonz](https://modrinth.com/mod/desert-dungeon-dungeonz-addon)) 🌀[Upgrade your netherite gear in a new warden dimension](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) 🧀[Enter the end to fight a stronger dragon](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-ending)
German 🛠️[Reforge deine Waffen und Rüstung](https://modrinth.com/mod/tieredz) 💍[Finde viele Artefakte](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) 📦[Benutze ein Lagersystem](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) ✈️[Fliege mit einem Hängegleiter](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider) 🛋️Nutze Dekoration: [Möbel](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture), [plushies](https://modrinth.com/mod/plushie), [sawmill](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-sawmill), [verbundene Ketten](https://modrinth.com/mod/connectiblechains), [trims auf tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/trimmable-tools), [Achterbahnen](https://modrinth.com/mod/splinecart) und [mehr Steinvarianten](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) 🎵[Spiele eigene Musik](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinurl) und [tanze](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) 🗝️[Finde überarbeitete trial chambers](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lukis-crazy-chambers) und andere verbesserte vanilla Strukuren 🔮[Verbessere deine Verzauberungen (Sharpness VI, Protection V, ...)](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion) --> (1) Töte _Invoker_ in Woodland Mansion; (2) Crafte _Imbuing Table_; (3) Spiele Raids für _Hallowed Gems_ 👹[Besiege neue Bosse für besondere Belohnungen](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) **🔒Die folgenden Funktionen können vorübergehend gesperrt werden, um den Fortschritt auf einem Server zu verlangsamen:**
🔥[Erkunde den Nether mit neuen Biomen](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium) und [Items und Strukturen](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternal-nether) 🏰[Erhalte Shulker-Kisten durch neue Dungeons in der Wüste](https://modrinth.com/mod/desert-dungeon-dungeonz-addon) 🌀[Verbessere dein Netherite-Equip in einer neuen Warden-Dimension](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) 🧀[Betrete das End, um gegen einen stärkeren Drachen zu kämpfen](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-ending)

## How to lock/unlock features: Has to be configured serverside or just for singleplayer
Nether **Lock:** Use command "/noportals disableNetherPortal true".

**Unlock:** Use command "/noportals disableNetherPortal false".

**Explanation:** Allows the creation of nether portals but playes will be unable to enter the dimension.
End **Lock:** Open "config/item_obliterator.json5" and remove the two slashes ("//") at the beginning of the line with "minecraft:ender_eye".

**Unlock:** Just add the dashes again.

**Explanation:** This makes it impossible to right click ender eyes, which are necessary to find the stronghold and open the portal.
Warden Dimension **Lock:** Open "config/item_obliterator.json5" and remove the two slashes ("//") at the beginning of the line with "deeperdarker:heart_of_the_deep".

**Unlock:** Just add the dashes again.

**Explanation:** This makes it impossible to obtain the "Heart of the Deep", which is necessary to open the portal.
Dungeons for shulker boxes **Lock:** Open "config\paxi\datapacks\desert_dungeon_dp\data\dungeonz\dungeon\desert_dungeon.json" and add " "minecraft:dragon_egg": 2 " in the empty line for "hard" in "required" at the botton.

**Unlock:** Just remove the added line

**Explanation:** This sets two dragon eggs as the required items to enter a dungeon and those are impossible to obtain.
## Why should you use this modpack? This modpack enhances the vanilla experience by optimizing the game, including many quality of life features and expanding the content. It is great for vanilla+ singleplayer and servers because it is simple to understand and not overwhelming while also adding more vanilla like aspects and progression.
